title: mentha × dalmatica var. stachyoides
intro: Mentha × dalmatica var. stachyoides, also known as Corsican mint, is a hybrid species of mint that is native to Europe, particularly in Corsica and Sardinia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Corsican mint include relief from nausea, headaches, and fever, as well as its ability to improve digestion and reduce stress. The herbal preparations of Mentha × dalmatica var. stachyoides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
